name: Tenacity
description: Tenacity — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Retry Library.

seo.title: Tenacity Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Tenacity analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

pros: Speeds up development with pre-built backend primitives

review.best_for: Startups and indie developers building MVPs
review.not_for: Teams with strict data residency requirements
